description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.4-alpine3.10 Docker image. In the global before_script, extract the PHP source, install build-base and autoconf via apk, install xdebug-2.9.0 with pecl and enable it, download and run the Composer installer, then run php composer.phar install with --no-ansi --no-interaction --profile --no-progress --no-suggest --prefer-dist, and finally alias phpunit to vendor/bin/phpunit. Cache the vendor/ directory between jobs. Add a test job that runs only on branches and merge requests and executes phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml.dist --coverage-text --colors=never.
